infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SuperPlatform uses your location to find nearby services and providers.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: SuperPlatform uses your location for real-time ride tracking.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SuperPlatform needs camera access to upload profile photos and service images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SuperPlatform needs photo library access to upload images.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SuperPlatform needs microphone access for video consultations.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: SuperPlatform needs contacts to suggest people you know.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow SuperPlatform to use your location.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SuperPlatform to access your camera.
